Failure Info: VM provision failed: VM is in starting state: 
Zone: zone2
Incident Time: 2025-12-03T01:32:19Z
VM ID: 02l7_29539aac-5246-4a55-9138-b7a5c49391fe

short_description: Observed multiple intermittent blips in PAR - eu-fr2
close_notes:
(All Timestamps must be in UTC)
Issue Summary: Observed multiple intermittent blips in PAR - eu-fr2
SME Findings: sme-team: SME Findings
Reason of Escalation:
Resolution Steps: We observed continuous intermittent blips in Zone2 only with no issues detected in other zones. CORE team identified that errors came from two nodes par2-qz1-sr1-rk020-s42 & par1-qz1-sr1-rk024-s02. CORE team tainted both the nodes to mitigate the issue. after that we didn't receive any blip in BNPP region. 
Signature of Issue:
● failed to get list for all Vms: virError(Code=1, Domain=7, Message='internal error: client socket is closed') // compute-agent
Not Found: storage pool path ..., error: virError(Code=1, Domain=7, Message='internal error: client socket is closed') //storage-agent

Jira/Github/Other Tickets: PRB0096149, PTASK0072983.
Category/Subcategory: is-volume/Acadia-Block-And-File-Storage-operations
Timeline Summary:

2025-12-03 01:32:19 Observed multiple intermittent blips in PAR - eu-fr2
2025-12-03 01:40:19 Core team Started investigating the issue further and got the alerted
in #core-monitoring channel about the AV Blips - https://ibm-cloudplatform.slack.com/archives/CR3PYKTEK/p1764725910495899
2025-12-03 01:40:19 Warroom created 
2025-12-03 02:26:00 Core team paged PDE7705961 storage sre team and asked to check the issue further as we have obeserved libvirtd restart.
2025-12-03 02:30:00 Arun Gopinathan joined from  Storage SRE team to check further on the issue.
2025-12-03 02:33 Marked the incident as PCIE
2025-12-03 02:39 Core team paged PDE7705979 Compute sre team and asked to check on the issue.
2025-12-03 02:50:00 Core team observed few more blips.
2025-12-03 03:00:00 Core Team tainted both the node par2-qz1-sr1-rk020-s42,par2-qz1-sr1-rk017-s12.
2025-12-03 03:45:00 Incident is resolved since, We have waited for sometime to see if the issue are repeating again.
Problem ticket PRB0096149 is created for storage team and PTASK(PTASK0072983) is Created for compute team -Observed multiple intermittent blips in PAR - eu-fr2
Resolution Runbook: Not Needed
Caused by Change/Incident: 
Warroom: #warroom-vpc-inc10464729
Meeting URL: Teams Meeting
Outage Start: 2025-12-03 01:20:28
Outage End: 2025-12-03 03:15:00
Detection Time: 2025-12-03 01:32:19
Identification Time: 2025-12-03 02:44:00
Mitigation Time: 2025-12-03 03:14:00
CIE pilot/co-pilot/squad names: Emil Jaquin Joy/Satyam Singh/Narasimman KA S
CORE Manager names: Ankit, Balaji
Executives(VPs) names:
Team mitigated the CIE: CORE IPOPS
Next Update Time:
current_status_next_steps: We have observed multiple  blip in  PAR - eu-fr2 currently Ipops, Compute team and storage team joined the call we are investigating the issue will keep you informed.
customer_facing_impact: Users may have experienced VM provisioning delays or failures.
